display.name: Apache Druid
display.description: Broker and coordinator metrics — query performance, JVM health, GC activity, and HTTP thread pool saturation.

display.name: Broker GC Count
display.description: Number of G1 GC cycles per interval for old and young generations. Frequent old-gen GC indicates heap pressure.

display.name: Broker GC CPU Time (ns)
display.description: CPU time consumed by G1 GC per interval (reported by Druid in nanoseconds). Rising old-gen values mean GC is stealing significant CPU from query processing.

display.name: Broker Heartbeat
display.description: Broker service heartbeat count — confirms the broker is alive and emitting metrics

display.name: Broker JVM Heap Memory
display.description: Broker JVM heap used vs committed vs max. Used approaching max signals GC pressure or an undersized heap.

display.name: Broker Open Connections
display.description: Current number of open Jetty connections on the broker

display.name: Broker Query CPU Time (µs)
display.description: CPU time consumed by scan queries on the broker (reported by Druid in microseconds). High CPU with low query time points to CPU-bound processing.

display.name: Broker Query Time (ms)
display.description: Average time to execute scan queries on the broker. Spikes indicate slow historical nodes or large scan ranges.

display.name: Broker Jetty Thread Pool
display.description: Broker HTTP thread pool — busy, idle, and total threads. Busy approaching total means the broker is close to rejecting requests.

display.name: Broker Thread Pool Utilization
display.description: Fraction of broker Jetty threads in use (0–1). Values near 1 indicate saturation.

display.name: Coordinator Duty Time
display.description: Latest time the coordinator spent running its management duty cycle (ms)

display.name: Coordinator Global Duty Times
display.description: Time each coordinator duty group takes to complete — Historical management, Indexing service, and Metadata store. Sustained spikes may indicate segment assignment backlog.

display.name: Coordinator GC Count
display.description: G1 GC cycles per interval on the coordinator — old and young generation. Elevated old-gen on the coordinator often precedes segment assignment slowdowns.

display.name: Coordinator JVM Heap Memory
display.description: Coordinator JVM heap used vs committed vs max. The coordinator is long-running; a growing used/max ratio over time suggests a memory leak.

display.name: Coordinator Jetty Thread Pool
display.description: Coordinator HTTP thread pool — busy, idle, and total. Useful for spotting coordinator API saturation during high segment load.
